records.m_Talk_ENG: EEEEEEEP!
records.m_Talk_DEU: EEEEEEEP!
records.m_Talk_FRA: EEEEEEEP!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh! I can't move!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh! I can't move!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh! I can't move!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-why you...! Let go of me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-why you...! Let go of me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-why you...! Let go of me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you I'd give you tips!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you I'd give you tips!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you I'd give you tips!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait... They're getting closer...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait... They're getting closer...
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait... They're getting closer...

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what are they trying to do? A-are they...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what are they trying to do? A-are they...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what are they trying to do? A-are they...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please... Notice my signal...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please... Notice my signal...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please... Notice my signal...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-Bora! I need you to come over here! R-right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-Bora! I need you to come over here! R-right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-Bora! I need you to come over here! R-right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? W-what...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? W-what...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? W-what...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Garam? And Naielle?! What are you two doing here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Garam? And Naielle?! What are you two doing here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Garam? And Naielle?! What are you two doing here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bora! It's been such a hassle to take care of this stupid girl!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bora! It's been such a hassle to take care of this stupid girl!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bora! It's been such a hassle to take care of this stupid girl!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I didn't know this would happen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I didn't know this would happen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I didn't know this would happen...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I almost died just now, you know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I almost died just now, you know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I almost died just now, you know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You automatically... get logged out... if you receive a certain amount of damage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You automatically... get logged out... if you receive a certain amount of damage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You automatically... get logged out... if you receive a certain amount of damage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle... apologize to Miss Garam. She's a new teacher.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle... apologize to Miss Garam. She's a new teacher.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle... apologize to Miss Garam. She's a new teacher.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-she's really a teacher?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-she's really a teacher?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-she's really a teacher?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apologize!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apologize!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apologize!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Errgh, that's it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errgh, that's it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errgh, that's it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've had it. I'm really scary to people who get on my nerves, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've had it. I'm really scary to people who get on my nerves, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've had it. I'm really scary to people who get on my nerves, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better be careful next time, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better be careful next time, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better be careful next time, Naielle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's log out, since the QA's over. Oh, and Miss Garam? Could I see you in my office, please?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's log out, since the QA's over. Oh, and Miss Garam? Could I see you in my office, please?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's log out, since the QA's over. Oh, and Miss Garam? Could I see you in my office, please?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Garam. I heard you didn't show up for today's orientation class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Garam. I heard you didn't show up for today's orientation class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Garam. I heard you didn't show up for today's orientation class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... Counters Legacy has such a complex system, so I needed more time to perform maintenance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... Counters Legacy has such a complex system, so I needed more time to perform maintenance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... Counters Legacy has such a complex system, so I needed more time to perform maintenance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't Bora in charge of maintenance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't Bora in charge of maintenance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't Bora in charge of maintenance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Being absent on the first day will leave a bad impression on the students, not to mention myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Being absent on the first day will leave a bad impression on the students, not to mention myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Being absent on the first day will leave a bad impression on the students, not to mention myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And especially for students like Naielle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And especially for students like Naielle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And especially for students like Naielle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know very well you are full of passion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know very well you are full of passion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know very well you are full of passion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't have you skip class for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't have you skip class for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't have you skip class for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, please be careful in the future, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, please be careful in the future, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, please be careful in the future, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... I'm sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll tell her... to do better...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll tell her... to do better...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll tell her... to do better...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It pains me to have to say these words.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It pains me to have to say these words.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It pains me to have to say these words.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bora, good luck on your first teaching tomorrow. Let's call it for today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bora, good luck on your first teaching tomorrow. Let's call it for today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bora, good luck on your first teaching tomorrow. Let's call it for today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I got scolded on the first day of my job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I got scolded on the first day of my job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I got scolded on the first day of my job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just trying to do my best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just trying to do my best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just trying to do my best.
